_note: Variant pipeline for claude_cli — uses a single `agent` node with NO YAAH-side tools. The model is expected to use ITS OWN native tools (Read, Edit, Bash via claude_cli's --allowedTools) to fix the bug. The harness orchestrates the pipeline + observability; claude owns the inside loop. Contrast with pipeline.json (agent_loop, YAAH owns the loop and dispatches the tools).
